creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
Andreas, Hi!

A couple of minor things to help us to speedup the things:

1 - when creating the diff, please create it from `/usr/ports`. This is the default behavior (sometimes we forgot to look in the patch, and the wring files end up patched). :-)

2 - when attaching a patch to a port you are the maintainer, please set the flag (top right corner) with `maintainer feedback +`. So, we will quick know this is maintainer approved patch (most fellows watch the bug reports from the mail lists). ;-)

Thank you for maintaining this port!
